data.title: Donald Trump's Personnel Picks: Voters Like Huckabee, Rubio Picks, Disapprove Of Kennedy, Oz, McMahon
data.description: A new Morning Consult poll shows Trump with a declining approval rating. A look at how the public approves and disapproves of potential cabinet picks.

data.title: AOC Challenges Musk's DOGE Agenda, Slams 'Defund The ACLU' Call By Trump's Efficiency Czar
data.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.), a prominent political figure, has responded to Elon Musk’s call for defunding the American Civil Liberties Union. In a social media post on Thursday, she also attacked proposed cuts by the Musk-headed Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Ka-Ching! Schwazze's Cannabis Accounting Bloopers And Other Historic Missteps That Shook Up Big Business
data.description: While Schwazze's issue may seem minor compared to past scandals, it serves as a reminder of how easily financial mistakes can spiral.

data.title: SpaceX's Satellite Expansion Challenged: Ukrainian-Americans Allege Elon Musk's Russian Ties And Environmental Risks In FCC Petition
data.description: The Ukrainian Congress Committee of America filed a petition with the Federal Communications Commission on Wednesday, Dec. 4, 2024, challenging SpaceX's satellite deployment plans.

data.title: Gamestop, Lululemon, Uber, Ulta Beauty And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Thursday, major U.S. indices closed in the red, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average slipping 0.5% to 44,765.71.
